sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n9367" key="a)nsxeqe/ein" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀνσχεθέειν</orth>, <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἄνσχεο</orth>, poet. forms, <sense id="n9367.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ἀνέχω.</ref> </xr> </sense> </entryFree>
